testcase.name: AutomatorEngine > constructor > should create an instance
AutomatorEngine > constructor > should initialize with an engine
AutomatorEngine > addRule > should add a rule without throwing
AutomatorEngine > addRule > should accept rule with valid structure
AutomatorEngine > evaluate > should return an array
AutomatorEngine > evaluate > should return empty array for no rules
AutomatorEngine > evaluate > should accept facts object
AutomatorEngine > evaluate > should handle empty facts
automator types > AutomatorRule > should accept valid rule object
automator types > AutomatorRule > should accept multiple conditions
automator types > AutomatorRule > should accept multiple actions
automator types > Condition > should accept valid condition object
automator types > Condition > should accept numeric values
automator types > Condition > should accept boolean values
automator types > Action > should accept change-status action
automator types > Action > should accept send-notification action
automator types > Action > should accept create-task action
automator types > Action > should accept assign-user action
automator types > Action > should accept all valid action types
